mapper.select:
SELECT rs.id, rs.ip_address, rs.region, rs.lifecycle_state, l.ip_type_id, l.provision_mode, l.dante_version, l.installed_at, l.socks5_port, l.socks5_username, l.socks5_password, b.expires_at, q.bandwidth_mbps, q.total_gb, rt.agent_version, rt.last_heartbeat_at FROM resource_server rs LEFT JOIN socks5_install l ON l.server_id = rs.id LEFT JOIN resource_server_billing b ON b.server_id = rs.id LEFT JOIN resource_server_quota q ON q.server_id = rs.id LEFT JOIN resource_server_runtime rt ON rt.server_id = rs.id
AND rs.server_type = #{serverType} AND rs.lifecycle_state = #{lifecycleState} AND l.ip_type_id = #{ipTypeId} AND (rs.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR rs.ip_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND rs.region IN #{r}
ORDER BY ISNULL(b.expires_at), b.expires_at ASC, rs.created_at DESC
mapper.sql: SELECT rs.id, rs.name, rs.ip_address AS host, rs.region, rs.lifecycle_state, rt.agent_version, rt.last_heartbeat_at, q.total_gb, t.rx_bytes, t.tx_bytes, t.used_bytes, t.throttle_state, x.xray_version FROM resource_server rs LEFT JOIN resource_server_runtime rt ON rt.server_id = rs.id LEFT JOIN resource_server_quota q ON q.server_id = rs.id LEFT JOIN resource_server_traffic t ON t.server_id = rs.id AND t.end_time IS NULL LEFT JOIN xray_install x ON x.server_id = rs.id
